content: Manus: cloud AI assistant (this system), used for complex development tasks, website building, research
Maestro: local AI agent for ildormire.com management (port 4002), handles site CMS, products, images
nik29: personal coordinator assistant (port 4001), handles general tasks, Telegram interface, memory
Open WebUI (localhost:8080): local LLM interface on Mac with Ollama models
ildormire.com: e-commerce site on VPS, managed by Maestro
Future goal: nik29 becomes the coordinator that can delegate to Maestro and other agents
